summary: Live/Archive | Fast Forward to End of Archive Game
description:
GIVEN the user is watching an Archive game
AND TTS is enabled
AND the user is Fast Forwarding

steps.action: WHEN the user fast-forwards to the end of the game
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: “Fast Forward, End of Game. Press left to rewind to beginning of the game”
AND the user will NOT hear: “Press Select to Pause, Press Up for Quick Actions, Press Down for More Options, Press Back to get back to video"
